description: Build-time deployment profile from apps/native/env.{development,release,e2e}.json — a checked-in public .env. Keys match environment variable names (e.g. VITE_SERVER_URL). Baked into the app at compile time; process env overrides at runtime. Do not commit secrets.

EVOLVE_MODEL.description: Used when the user has not chosen an evolve model in Settings.
EVOLVE_MODEL.title: Default evolve model

EVOLVE_PROVIDER.description: Used when the user has not chosen an evolve provider in Settings.
EVOLVE_PROVIDER.title: Default evolve provider

NIXMAC_COMPLETION_LOG_DIR.description: Override the directory for AI completion JSONL logs. Defaults to ~/Library/Application Support/nixmac/logs/.
NIXMAC_COMPLETION_LOG_DIR.title: Completion log directory

NIXMAC_LOGFILE.description: When set, tracing output is mirrored to this file in addition to stderr.
NIXMAC_LOGFILE.title: Rust log file path

NIXMAC_RECORD_COMPLETIONS.description: When true, full request/response payloads for every AI provider call are written to a daily JSONL file and mirrored to stderr.
NIXMAC_RECORD_COMPLETIONS.title: Record AI completion request/response JSONL

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Prefer env vars or keychain for secrets; do not commit in env.*.json.
OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API key

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Prefer env vars or keychain for secrets; do not commit in env.*.json.
OPENROUTER_API_KEY.title: OpenRouter API key

SUBMITTED_FEEDBACK_DSN.description: Path segment for feedback submission endpoint.
SUBMITTED_FEEDBACK_DSN.title: Feedback DSN

SUMMARY_AI_PROVIDER.description: Used when the user has not chosen a summary provider in Settings.
SUMMARY_AI_PROVIDER.title: Default summary provider

SUMMARY_MODEL.description: Used when the user has not chosen a summary model in Settings.
SUMMARY_MODEL.title: Default summary model

VITE_POSTHOG_KEY.description: Public PostHog project key for client analytics. Prefer CI env override for production.
VITE_POSTHOG_KEY.title: PostHog project key

VITE_SERVER_URL.description: Better Auth / API origin for the nixmac web app.
VITE_SERVER_URL.title: Web server URL

VLLM_API_KEY.description: Prefer env vars or keychain for secrets; do not commit in env.*.json.
VLLM_API_KEY.title: OpenAI-compatible API key

title: Environment
